data.name: labAreaSetPriorityTitle.Text
data.value: 區塊等級設定值(優先順序功能)：

data.name: tableLayoutPanel11.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="labAreaSetPriorityTitle" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="6" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lsbAreaAccessData" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="6" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label4" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="groupBox3" Row="0" RowSpan="3" Column="7" ColumnSpan="3" /><Control Name="labAreaSetTitle" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="4" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="lsbAreaSetData" Row="1" RowSpan="2" Column="4" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="btnAreaSetDel" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lsbAreaGradeName" Row="1" RowSpan="2" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="btnAreaSetAdd" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lsbAreaName" Row="1" RowSpan="2" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnAreaSetMGSL" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="6" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10" /><Rows Styles="Percent,10,Percent,45,Percent,45" /></TableLayoutSettings>
